name: Dick Durbin
subject: This is our only choice, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
In recent weeks, we have seen the Democratic-led House take decisive action on everything from protecting Dreamers to reforming our gun safety laws to getting big money out of politics.
But in the Senate, Majority Leader Mitch McConnell has shamefully acted as a self-described "Grim Reaper," allowing bill after bill to die in his legislative graveyard.
[**We have the power to change this by electing a Democratic majority in 2020. Ahead of our crucial end-of-quarter deadline, can you contribute $5 to help us get there?**](http://action.dickdurbin. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-eoq-june-2019?refcode=em190629&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Even if we defeat President Trump next year, we will continue to face extreme partisan gridlock from Leader McConnell and the GOP if we don't take back the Senate, too. We need to elect new Democrats, but we also need to defend every Senate seat--including right here in Illinois.
With a Democratic Senate majority, we can begin undoing the damage the Trump Administration has wrought and move forward with a progressive agenda for our country.
[**We are facing a critical end-of-quarter deadline tomorrow and there 's no time to waste. Can you help make a Democratic Senate a reality in 2020? Contribute $5 right now.**](http://action.dickdurbin. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-eoq-june-2019?refcode=em190629&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://action.dickdurbin. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-eoq-june-2019?refcode=em190629&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Should you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c9f/42ab3cf4/63fca094/135d6abc/4174460039/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c9f/42ab3cf4/63fca094/135d6abd/4174460039/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")
Friends of Dick Durbin
Attn: Online Department
101 W. Grand, Suite 200
Chicago, IL 60654

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: please let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | _**[In a moment, I 'm going to ask you for $15 before my End of Quarter Deadline in 24 hours. But first, please let me explain why:](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcdac/3eb3e2fc/450985b6/744ac30a/3191186121/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190629_em_fr_b4_castro_all_rs&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25")**_ My grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was 7 years old after losing both of her parents. She was an orphan when she came to this country. She took care of her younger sister by working as a maid and a housekeeper and never made it past the 4th grade. My mom was a single mother. She raised my brother Joaquin and me on the West Side of San Antonio. It's not the safest neighborhood, but to this day, I'm proud to call it home. I know it was a struggle every single month for her to find the money to pay the rent. But she taught me that even though we weren't born into privilege, we could be whatever we wanted to be. **When I took the stage at the Democratic debates this week, my message resonated with voters because I know your struggle.** ** ** I didn't come from privilege... I'm from one of those neighborhoods people avoid... I was raised by a single mother... I'm from an immigrant family... I'm so humbled that supporters across this country have rushed in money to keep my campaign going after my message resonated with them. I'm not taking a cent of corporate PAC money, so your support is fully fueling our campaign. You probably know that we need a huge amount of individual donors to qualify for the next debate -- and I haven't hit the threshold yet. If I made you proud in the debates -- and if you want my campaign in it for the long run -- please rush in $15. Help get me to the next debate stage and keep me in this race: | | [**Chip in $15 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcdac/3eb3e2fc/450985b6/744ac309/3191186121/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190629_em_fr_b4_castro_all_rs&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=15")
---

---

Thank you,

Julian

| | | | | | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcdac/3eb3e2fc/450985b6/744ac375/3191186121/VEsB/ "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro")

| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcdac/3eb3e2fc/450985b6/744ac374/3191186121/VEsO/ "https://www.facebook.com/Julian-Castro-97458155742/")

| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcdac/3eb3e2fc/450985b6/744ac373/3191186121/VEsP/ "https://www.instagram.com/juliancastrotx/")
---
| | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the first debates and send him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must reach 130,000 donors this summer to secure his spot on the Democratic debate stage.

Julian hasn't qualified yet, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money. Will you help him get there?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcdac/3eb3e2fc/450985b6/744ac372/3191186121/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcdac/3eb3e2fc/450985b6/744ac371/3191186121/VEsHBA/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcdac/3eb3e2fc/450985b6/744ac370/3191186121/VEsHBw/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: ElizabethWarren.com
subject: Chip in any amount, and Elizabeth might call you to say thanks (and hear your story)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Picture this: Your phone starts to ring (or vibrate). You check to see who's calling. An unknown number? Who could this be? So you pick up, just in case. "Hello?" Sure enough... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ec93/45c30650/17c92eb98/669d0c52/893386483/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
**Tomorrow night is the most important[fundraising deadline](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ec93/45c30650/17c92eb98/669d0c55/893386483/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWp1bjE5ZW9xIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDYyOWVtNS1lb3EtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-jun19eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190629em5-eoq-full") of our campaign so far.**

With the deadline this close, some candidates would spend the final hours calling ultra-millionaires and asking them to write big checks.

**But not Elizabeth.** She doesn't make calls based on how much money someone is able to donate -- because a person's wealth shouldn't determine how much access they get to a presidential candidate.

**Instead, tonight, she 's set aside some time to call grassroots donors who chip in _any amount_. Will you be one of them? Make a donation to help hit our goal, and Elizabeth might call you tonight to say thanks.** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

>
Picture this: Your phone starts to ring (or vibrate). You check to see who's calling. _An unknown number? Who could this be?_ So you pick up, just in case. "Hello?"

Sure enough..."Hello, it's Elizabeth Warren!"

**This might actually happen to you.**

She only has room for these phone calls in her schedule because she doesn't do "call time" with wealthy donors, and she doesn't host fancy fundraisers.

That means your grassroots support is the only thing that powers our movement. And we're counting on you to help reach this goal before the deadline.

**[Thank you for being in this fight. Can you chip in for the first time before midnight tomorrow to own an equal piece of this campaign? We can only make big, structural change if we fight side by side.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ec93/45c30650/17c92eb98/669d0c55/893386483/VEsHAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWp1bjE5ZW9xIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDYyOWVtNS1lb3EtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-jun19eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190629em5-eoq-full")**

And after you make a contribution, watch your phone!

Thanks,

Team Warren

name: Brandon Beach
subject: Can we count on you?
body:
Friend, thank you for your support over the years as I have entered the political fray to give our community the voice it deserves. I know the current political landscape can seem toxic and broken, but together we have accomplished great things for the state of Georgia – and I’m just getting started.

We have delivered the largest income tax cut in Georgia’s history. We have balanced our budget and slashed regulations. We have fully-funded public schools AND increased options for hardworking parents to give their children the education of their choosing. We have boldly stood for life and protected our 2nd amendment rights.

I say all this to highlight that while Washington may be broken, Georgia is moving forward. That is what has motivated me to run for Congress. It’s time we have a representative who will deliver for our community.

I know what it takes to lead and win. I know our community. No one else in this race can say that.

Please consider donating to our campaign today before the end of the month: http://www.beachforcongress.com/Donate

Thank you and God bless you and your family,

Brandon

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you are no longer interested you can unsubscribe instantly:
https://brandonbeach.cmail20.com/t/r-u-jidiyhdk-udyuidthb-r/

name: Jake Fons
subject: If you've been waiting, now is the time to step up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Please read tonight.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june?refcode=rtw_20190629_em-3-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend,

**Tina needs your help now. If you 've been waiting to make your first contribution, now is the time to do it. **
* First, the GOP attacked Tina online, and pro-Trump super PACs dropped a five-figure ad spend against her.
* This is after Trump came to Minnesota and said he would win the state after coming within 1.5 points in 2016.
* And we just learned the GOP hosted a training for hundreds of Minnesota Republicans last week to prepare them to organize for Trump all over our state and turn Minnesota red.

**That 's why I'm coming to you now. [Please rush your first contribution of $10 or whatever you are able now. We need to raise $12,991 from grassroots contributions by midnight tomorrow to stay on track.](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june?refcode=rtw_20190629_em-3-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june?refcode=rtw_20190629_em-3-full&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto") Your contribution determines if we're able to organize, buy ads, and do everything we need to do to win.

Hitting this end-of-quarter goal is so important, friend. If we miss it, even by a dollar, we know Republicans will think we're losing enthusiasm, and we'll have to cut back.

Can you rush your first contribution towards our $25,000 goal before midnight tomorrow? Make a contribution here: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june?refcode=rtw_20190629_em-3-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Counting on you,

Jake Fons

name: Kamala 2020
subject: Post-debate poll:
body:
We have momentum right now.
In the 24 hours after the debate, our grassroots team raised $2 million
online. Over 30,000 new people pitched in for the very first time.

And now, new polling from Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight says Kamala
“doubled her support” after the debate.

It’s just one poll, but this much is clear: when people learn more about
Kamala Harris, they like what they see.

Now, it’s on us to seize this momentum. Will you pitch in before
tomorrow’s FEC deadline to help us introduce Kamala to millions more
undecided voters across the country?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190629-eoq?refcode=ema190629-24-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1001&refcode2=5483_5755789_SQjOtW&akid=5483%2E5755789%2ESQjOtW ]Chip in $5 now

Anything you pitch in before the FEC deadline will make a real difference.
We have to hit the ground running on Monday morning with new targeted
digital ads, a beefed-up travel schedule to keep Kamala on the road
meeting directly with more voters, and more support for our grassroots
organizers on the ground.

It’s going to take considerable resources. But it’s what’s required to win
this election.

Kamala has never run for president before, and she didn’t walk into this
race with a war chest of campaign cash. But on Thursday night, she showed
the country that she’s ready to win this race -- it’s up to us to help
build a movement from the ground up to help her win.

Tomorrow, we’ll close the books on a crucial FEC fundraising deadline.
Pitch in right now to seize this moment:

name: Chris Evans, Beto for America
subject: A reporter asked if I’m worried
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
#
We have an ambitious goal ahead of us: raise $600,000 by tomorrow at midnight. And reporters have begun reaching out about whether or not we’re going to hit the mark. One asked if I’m worried that we’d fall short of this key target.
They’re asking because at this stage in the race, people want to know whether campaigns like ours have what it takes to defeat Donald Trump. And while I’m confident that Beto is the candidate for the job, we also need to prove that we have the resources and grassroots strength to match. So, I’m asking you:
[Can you make a $3 donation to Beto’s campaign before midnight tomorrow? This is a critical FEC fundraising deadline, and we have an opportunity to send a powerful message about the strength of our campaign.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18021?refcode=ema20190629-39568&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=39568%2E444211%2EEj3k2U)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18021?refcode=ema20190629-39568&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=39568%2E444211%2EEj3k2U)**
Whether it’s $1 or $10, each individual donation means another person has been inspired to invest in our campaign and Beto’s vision for America. We need that at this moment. So no matter what you can afford — or even if you can’t quite make it happen this time — just know that your support means the world to us.
Appreciate you,

Chris Evans
Beto for America
**[Contribute »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18021?refcode=ema20190629-39568&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=39568%2E444211%2EEj3k2U)**

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=22&akid=39568%2E444211%2EEj3k2U). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: Danielle Hirshberg, Team Hickenlooper
subject: Getting a word in.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
In order to qualify for the fall debates, we need 130,000 people to step up and support John. We need your name on the record now--chipping in even $1 is enough to help us grow our team. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771767/691c9bd/6d616bf9/11a41060/1438630683/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend, since Thursday we've heard from so many folks expressing their support and enthusiasm after seeing John on stage--and hoping that, in future debates, he'll get even more time and opportunities to weigh in on the issues that matter most to our country.

**In order to qualify for the fall debates, we need 130,000 people to step up and support John. We need your name on the record now --chipping in even $1 is enough to help us grow our team.** ******[](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190629_DH_20190629-fr-DH-130-ndnr_ndnr_contribbutton1&recurring=auto&amounts=1,5,25,50,100,500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****** John is a storyteller, and his time leading Colorado was full of incredible breakthroughs and victories on issues ranging from gun violence prevention to climate change to healthcare.

He told some of those tales on Thursday night, but there is so much left to be said--even after spending hours in long car rides around Iowa and New Hampshire with him the last few months, I still haven't heard them all.

**If you want to see John get more time on stage to share his vision to the fullest, please become a supporter now to ensure his participation in future debates.** ****[](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190629_DH_20190629-fr-DH-130-ndnr_ndnr_contribbutton1&recurring=auto&amounts=1,5,25,50,100,500&amount=1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**** Thank you,
Danielle

Danielle Hirshberg
Creative Director
Hickenlooper 2020
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
---

PO Box 6377, Denver, CO 80206
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper 2020 team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771767/691c9bd/6d616bf9/11a4119f/1438630683/VEsC/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/join-in")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771767/691c9bd/6d616bf9/11a4119c/1438630683/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771767/691c9bd/6d616bf9/11a4119d/1438630683/VEsA/ "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771767/691c9bd/6d616bf9/11a4119a/1438630683/VEsB/ "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771767/691c9bd/6d616bf9/11a4119b/1438630683/VEsO/ "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--but if at any point you'd like to opt out, you can do so right [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771767/691c9bd/6d616bf9/11a41198/1438630683/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

name: Kevin Danz, Deputy Finance Director
subject: Friend - let’s close out STRONG
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tomlinsonforsenatelaunch?refcode=em_header [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tomlinsonforsenatelaunch?refcode=em_header]
Dear Friend,

You’re hearing this a lot, from a lot of campaigns (including ours), but it’s true. This is Teresa’s very first public disclosure of her fundraising efforts, and we still have a gap to close before midnight tonight.

I told Teresa on my first day on the campaign that we could inspire a grassroots movement to get her elected, and she looked me square in the eye and said, “Prove it. Let’s get 2,000 grassroots donors in our first two months.”

I knew that she meant business and would work for every single one. And that’s what she’s done, standing up against Georgia’s abortion ban, for disaster relief, and holding David Perdue accountable.

Right now, Friend, we’re only 167 donors away from hitting that goal. Only 167! I know we can do it, but we need YOUR help.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eoq?refcode=em063019a-logo&noskip=true [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eoq?refcode=em063019a-logo&noskip=true]

Chip in any amount right now before our midnight deadline, and put us over the top. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eoq?refcode=em063019a-logo&noskip=true]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Express Donate $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eoq?refcode=em063019a-logo&amount=5&express_lane=true]
Express Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eoq?refcode=em063019a-logo&amount=25&express_lane=true]
Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eoq?refcode=em063019a-logo&amount=50&express_lane=true]
Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eoq?refcode=em063019a-logo&amount=100&express_lane=true]
Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eoq?refcode=em063019a-logo&amount=250&express_lane=true]
Donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eoq?refcode=em063019a-logo&express_lane=true]

Teresa is going to take the fight to David Perdue and all his special interest cronies who line their pockets with campaign cash.
Chip in today, and let’s show Perdue just how big of a fight he has coming.

Thanks,
Kevin

Kevin Danz
Deputy Finance Director

clean_body: = Peter, We have less than 24 hours to hit our big $25,000 fundraising goal for the quarter and I need your help to get it done. This campaign is all about people power — that is why we will always want to have lots of small dollar donors over a few wealthy donors who can call the shots. Setting up a $10 recurring donation to our campaign now will help us run a strong campaign to take on Republican incumbent McCaul. It helps us plan for the future and will allow us to make big strides early in the campaign. Last year showed that we have what it takes to win this race and restore Democratic representation in the Texas 10th. With your support and the support of countless more — we will finally flip this district! For the people, Mike Siegel = = =** = PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

name: Whitney Holt
subject: What we need to get done today (please read)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger For Congress
body:
At midnight tonight, we'll close the books on our second quarter of the year and prepare our fundraising numbers for the FEC and the public to review.
| | Today's the day we've been working toward, Peter!

At midnight tonight, we'll close the books on our second quarter of the year and prepare our fundraising numbers for the FEC and the public to review.

[**Before that happens though, we 've still got a little bit of work to do. Most importantly, we need to raise the final $5,411 of our end-of-quarter goal. >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5_vZLuXyKzACPfkKtONxI-fxT23yFFxfMzUEakJNL0U=/E69aeZTfVNCB5MikozWjTUPdhoE8MD0CpME3dxmDWNc=?refcode=em_fr_2019.06.30_b1_wh_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800) | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.myngp.com/el/5_vZLuXyKzACPfkKtONxI-fxT23yFFxfMzUEakJNL0U=/E69aeZTfVNCB5MikozWjTUPdhoE8MD0CpME3dxmDWNc=?refcode=em_fr_2019.06.30_b1_wh_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)
---
I want to keep Abigail in Congress so she can keep working for Virginia. In a district that the president won by almost 7 points, we know she's a top target.

National Republican groups have already launched attacks against Abigail in an early effort to weaken her re-election. After the 2018 election, we know what we are up against, and that is why we need to have the resources to fight back and share our message.

[**Can you help us do that by making a donation before tonight 's end-of-quarter deadline? We only have 13 hours to reach our goal, but with your help Peter, I know we can get there. >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5_vZLuXyKzACPfkKtONxI-fxT23yFFxfMzUEakJNL0U=/E69aeZTfVNCB5MikozWjTUPdhoE8MD0CpME3dxmDWNc=?refcode=em_fr_2019.06.30_b1_wh_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)
[CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.myngp.com/el/5_vZLuXyKzACPfkKtONxI-fxT23yFFxfMzUEakJNL0U=/E69aeZTfVNCB5MikozWjTUPdhoE8MD0CpME3dxmDWNc=?refcode=em_fr_2019.06.30_b1_wh_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)
---
Let's end this quarter strong,

Whitney Holt
Finance Director
Abigail Spanberger For Congress
| Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/5_vZLuXyKzACPfkKtONxI-fxT23yFFxfMzUEakJNL0U=/BznbHvQ7ClBGHouKZaT-BrjpD6LwOvDNZebfEFZpnT8=)

( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-june19-eoq?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_190630_1_7&recurring=true&amount=10.00&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

to help us meet our goal – you clearly see the threat Republicans
pose around the country and right here in California.

We know we’ve asked you for help on more than one occasion.
We need your help again ahead of tonight’s public FEC fundraising
deadline.
( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-june19-eoq?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_190630_1_7&recurring=true&amount=10.00&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

will be made PUBLIC in a matter of hours.

Republicans vying for office in competitive districts will
see.

Trump will see.

EVERYONE WILL SEE.

This is the time to show Republicans just how much we’re made
of. Please chip in whatever you can.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-june19-eoq
( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-june19-eoq?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_190630_1_7&recurring=true&amount=10.00&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

Thompson for Congress HQ

Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Before there's 2020, there's 2019, and you can make a big difference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek:

This is a drum you've probably heard me beat before -- and I'm going to keep it up, because it couldn't be more important: **We've got major elections happening here in Virginia this year.** [**Will you step up right now to support the Virginia Democratic House and Senate Caucuses who are working hard to secure big wins?**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1778/3e0906/78afdabc/3e309d08/38824941/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-va-dem-caucuses?source=20190630_1_FR_TK_VA-Dem-Caucuses&amount=30&refcode=20190630_1_FR_TK_VA-Dem-Caucuses&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+step+up+right+now+to+support+th&utm_campaign=20190630_1_FR_TK_VA-Dem-Caucuses")

This isn't the first time we've had the nation's eyes on elections in the Commonwealth. In 2017, when this country needed an injection of hope, Virginia stepped up. We elected Democrats up and down the ticket and flipped districts we never expected to flip. We elected Virginia's first Latina delegates and our first transgender delegate. Voters across the Commonwealth stood up and said we need to be represented by more women, more young people, more people of color, more Democrats -- and then they walked straight to the polls and made it happen.

**Let's give the country even more to feel hopeful about. Join me in supporting the Virginia House and Senate Democratic Caucuses, two organizations that are building the ground game we need to win in November:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$15**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1778/3e0906/78afdabc/3e309d0f/38824941/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-va-dem-caucuses?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=20190630_1_FR_TK_VA-Dem-Caucuses_x15&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+15&utm_campaign=20190630_1_FR_TK_VA-Dem-Caucuses&source=20190630_1_FR_TK_VA-Dem-Caucuses")
---
| [**$30**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1778/3e0906/78afdabc/3e309d0e/38824941/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-va-dem-caucuses?express_lane=true&amount=30&refcode=20190630_1_FR_TK_VA-Dem-Caucuses_x30&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+30&utm_campaign=20190630_1_FR_TK_VA-Dem-Caucuses&source=20190630_1_FR_TK_VA-Dem-Caucuses")
---
| [**OTHER**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1778/3e0906/78afdabc/3e309d0d/38824941/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-va-dem-caucuses?express_lane=true&refcode=20190630_1_FR_TK_VA-Dem-Caucuses_xother&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+OTHER&utm_campaign=20190630_1_FR_TK_VA-Dem-Caucuses&source=20190630_1_FR_TK_VA-Dem-Caucuses")
---
We carried that Democratic energy from 2017 right into 2018, when Virginia helped flip the House of Representatives and sent three amazing women to Washington. There was record turnout last year! We saw the highest turnout for a Virginia off-year election in a generation -- it was 10 points higher than the national average. And that turnout was driven by young people, people of color, and a whole lot of Virginians who are sick and tired of President Trump and Republicans trying to take away people's health care, attacking women's constitutional rights, and refusing to take any meaningful action to protect our communities from gun violence.

**I know we can step up and do it again. And when we do, we'll send a message to people all over this country that** **Democrats have the momentum that it's going to take to regain a Democratic majority in the U.S. Senate, hold onto the House of Representatives, and put a Democratic president back in the White House!**

Please stand with me today and support Virginia Democrats ahead of this first major fundraising deadline of the general election. Your contribution helps close the fundraising gap between Republicans and Democrats, and even more than that, it shows all the pundits and outside groups tracking this election that we are ready to win in 2019 and beyond.

**Click here to chip in before tonight's midnight deadline:** [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-va-dem-caucuses**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1778/3e0906/78afdabc/3e309d0c/38824941/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-va-dem-caucuses?source=20190630_1_FR_TK_VA-Dem-Caucuses&amount=30&refcode=20190630_1_FR_TK_VA-Dem-Caucuses&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+httpssecureactbluecomdonatetkvademcaucus&utm_campaign=20190630_1_FR_TK_VA-Dem-Caucuses")

Thanks a lot.

-Tim Kaine

******[**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1778/3e0906/78afdabc/3e309d03/38824941/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-va-dem-caucuses?source=20190630_1_FR_TK_VA-Dem-Caucuses&amount=30&refcode=20190630_1_FR_TK_VA-Dem-Caucuses&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20190630_1_FR_TK_VA-Dem-Caucuses")******

We believe that emails are a crucial way for Tim to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1778/3e0906/78afdabc/3e309d06/38824941/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=11+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20190630_1_FR_TK_VA-Dem-Caucuses&source=20190630_1_FR_TK_VA-Dem-Caucuses")

Team Kaine is powered by grassroots supporters like you. Your sustained support is critical to Tim. If you'd like to donate, please [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1778/3e0906/78afdabc/3e309d05/38824941/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-support?refcode=email_footer&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=12+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20190630_1_FR_TK_VA-Dem-Caucuses&source=20190630_1_FR_TK_VA-Dem-Caucuses") Thanks for having Tim's back!

P.O. Box 239
Alexandria, VA 22313-0239

subject: This moment is critical
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |

| Friend, Today is our big end-of-quarter FEC deadline, and all I can say right now is thank you. This week has been incredible. So many people have supported our efforts on social media and stepped up to become founding donors of our campaign. It's been truly inspiring. But we're at a critical moment in this race, team -- and we can't afford to let this momentum slip away. That's why this FEC deadline is so important. [_**So I 'm asking you to become a founding donor by chipping in whatever you can before midnight tonight.**_](https://act.corybooker. "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190630-em?refcode=em_fr_20190630_CB_20190630-fr-CB-deadlineday1-actives_2020ndnr_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Cory

This campaign is moving quickly. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: By midnight tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
If we keep letting big money control our campaigns, the wealthy and well-connected will keep controlling Washington. And our government will keep working just for people who can afford to hire... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852eca7/45c30650/17c33db0e/669d338e/110134923/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
I'll just be blunt: I'm about to ask if you can make a donation to our campaign. But first, can you give me a minute to explain why it would make a real difference toward helping hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal by midnight tonight?

Here's the way I see it: Our campaign is based on big ideas and a core principle -- everyone gets equal access because we're fighting for a government that works for everyone.

Our democracy is not for sale, and neither is my time.

So I've opted out of the unwritten rule of politics that says I'm supposed to run for office by sucking up to rich donors on Wall Street and powerful interests in Washington.

I'm not hosting swanky fundraisers where you can only get in if you write a ginormous check. I'm not taking PAC money, donations from federal lobbyists, or applications from billionaires who want to run a Super PAC on my behalf.

**If we keep letting big money control our campaigns, the wealthy and well-connected will keep controlling Washington. And our government will keep working just for people who can afford to hire armies of lobbyists and lawyers.**

We're fighting to change all that. We're building a grassroots movement to put power in the hands of the people.

**And it 's only possible with contributions from people like you. I'm grateful from the bottom of my heart that you're on our team. Will you make a donation right now to help make sure we hit our goal? We're a little behind right now, but we can make it happen with a big push before midnight tonight.** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

---
>
When we hit our fundraising goals -- dollar by dollar, quarter after quarter -- and keep building our movement -- face to face, person to person -- we show the rich and the powerful that change is coming. Sooner than they think.

Billionaires, CEOs, big banks, and giant corporations won't always run the show in Washington.

I've got a plan -- a bunch of plans -- to level the playing field for working people and make sure we're building a future not just for some of our kids, but all of our kids.

If the rich and powerful don't like it, then tough.

**We 've got to make big, structural change. We're _going_ to.** But it'll take a massive grassroots movement to get it done.

**[But first, our next big test is the fundraising deadline tonight at midnight, and we need all hands on deck to hit our goal. If you can, please chip in.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852eca7/45c30650/17c33db0e/669d33fa/110134923/VEsHAA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWp1bjE5ZW9xIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDYyOWVtNi1lb3EtZWMtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-jun19eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190629em6-eoq-ec-full")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

body:
Team -- Emails like this one are extremely important, especially with a big fundraising deadline looming.
When the quarter ends, a public report will show how much we've raised. Pundits and corporate special interests will use it as a measure of our strength. This means that a lot of public officials spend every minute they can on the phone asking wealthy folks for big checks.
But Senator Hassan is relying on people like you giving $3 or more to emails like this one so that she can spend more time fighting for hardworking families like yours.
[**We 're still short of the $10,000 we need to raise by midnight and $3 or more from you would help us close the gap. Will you please give $3 or more right now to help protect this extremely vulnerable Democratic Senate seat and win back the majority?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc21b/2a380d31/3e0a4309/f138d6/3340424361/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDYyOV9lb3EzX1JPIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20190629_eoq3_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

name: Josh Mahony
subject: Arkansas has always been there for me
disclaimer_text: paid for by corporations, then contribute any amount to help Josh keep fighting
body:
That's why I'm fighting to be our voice in Washington.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7919167/75618871/-1972795140?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzUyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODUwNTdkNC01NzliLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r2GZWkEcsMWR0JIZt1YOL_sj-VdSFTbtosqVj4Qxmso=&refcode=em190630josh-s1&amount=10&recurring=auto&refcode2=header)
---
| Friend,

We have just 12 hours to go, and we're so close to hitting our end-of-quarter goal of 2,000 grassroots donors. Let me explain why this is crucial.

We have a lot of work ahead of us if we're going to win this race and take control of the Senate. From organizing in communities that haven't seen a campaign visit in years to building up our campaign infrastructure to recruiting volunteers and registering new voters, it's a big job. We can't do it without a big network of grassroots supporters.

**[That's why I'm asking, will you donate $10 or whatever you can and stand with me before the end-of-quarter deadline? If 107 supporters step up before midnight, we'll hit our goal of 2,000 grassroots donations before we officially file our FEC report.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7919168/75618873/-1972795140?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzUyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODUwNTdkNC01NzliLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r2GZWkEcsMWR0JIZt1YOL_sj-VdSFTbtosqVj4Qxmso=&refcode=em190630josh-s1&amount=10&recurring=auto&refcode2=cta1)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Express Donate $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7919169/75618874/-1972795140?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzUyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODUwNTdkNC01NzliLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r2GZWkEcsMWR0JIZt1YOL_sj-VdSFTbtosqVj4Qxmso=&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em190630josh-s1&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode2=express10)

I see it every day on the campaign trail: Arkansans may not have much, but we always have each other. Whether it was strangers stopping on the side of the road when my truck's alternator failed, or my friends rallying around me when my dad passed away, Arkansas has always been there for me.

Arkansan spirit has seen our communities through the toughest times. Now, we can use that same grassroots power to make our voices heard in Washington. And when we file an FEC report that's 2,000 grassroots donations strong, we'll send a powerful message to everyone that Arkansas won't be ignored.

**[We need just 107 more donations to hit our goal, but we're running out of time. Will you pitch in $10 before midnight and put us over the top?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7919177/75618900/-1972795140?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzUyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODUwNTdkNC01NzliLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r2GZWkEcsMWR0JIZt1YOL_sj-VdSFTbtosqVj4Qxmso=&refcode=em190630josh-s1&amount=10&recurring=auto&refcode2=cta2)**

Let's go,

Josh

| | Josh Mahony is a native Arkansan, non-profit leader and small business owner. He's running to replace Tom Cotton and make sure everyday Arkansans have a voice in the Senate. If you want a senator who speaks for you and isn't bought and paid for by corporations, then contribute any amount to help Josh keep fighting. name: Andrea Ryan
subject: you already know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Hi team,

**First** , they said Tim could never catch up to some of the candidates who've been running for president for months.

**Then,** Tim shocked everyone by polling among the top candidates in the early states and qualifying for the first presidential debate.

**_Now,_ according to the media and post-debate polls -- Tim's support is growing faster than any other candidate! **

**[Today is the LAST day to support Tim before his critical Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline. Help Tim keep up his momentum by showing your support RIGHT NOW, when it really matters: ](http://secure.timryanforamerica. "http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/FEC-deadline?amount=3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=automatic&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190630_1_12_T1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+Today+is+the+LAST+day+to+support+Tim+bef&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190630_1_12_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190630_1_12_T2")[_https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/FEC-deadline#June_2019_](http://secure.timryanforamerica. "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/FEC-deadline?amount=3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=automatic&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190630_1_12_T1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+httpssecuretimryanforamericacomFECdeadli&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190630_1_12_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190630_1_12_T2")**

Tim's vision has never once wavered: protecting access to health care, solving the humanitarian crisis at our southern border, coming up with a plan to tackle climate change, finding ways to stimulate the economy -- these are the issues that drive my husband and power this campaign.

**But we need your help to ensure Tim can continue sharing this vision.**

We have less than 24 hours to show he has the grassroots momentum he needs before the FEC deadline -- time is of the essence.

**Contribute now to help Tim keep up this fight:[_https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/FEC-deadline#June_2019_](http://secure.timryanforamerica. "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/FEC-deadline?amount=3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=automatic&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190630_1_12_T1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3+-+httpssecuretimryanforamericacomFECdeadli&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190630_1_12_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190630_1_12_T2")**

Thanks team!
Andrea
|

subject: before the meeting
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | | Hey, sorry to reach out so early, but we just left our morning meeting and we wanted you to see this right away:

| **MONTH** | **GOAL** | **LEFT TO RAISE** | **CONTRIBUTION PAGE**
---|---|---|---
**APRIL** | Surpassed | N/A | Inactive
**MAY** | Surpassed | N/A | Inactive
**JUNE** | **$8,000** | **$1,534** | [**CLICK HERE TO DONATE**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dws-june-eoq?refcode=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190630_1_9&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=1+-+CLICK+HERE+TO+DONATE&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190630_1_9&source=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190630_1_9")

With the match in effect, there's no reason we shouldn't be able to make up this deficit before the books close at midnight and our numbers go public. Can you rush a donation right away to help hold the House?

**[https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/june-eoq](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz. name: Kamala Harris
subject: I believe
body:
Here’s how I see it:

We need somebody on the debate stage in the general election who knows how
to recognize a rap sheet when they see it and prosecute the case against
four more years of Donald Trump. Someone who knows how to fight like hell
for what we believe in -- and win.

If you’re with me, I need you to pitch in to our campaign today. Whatever
you can give before tonight’s FEC deadline will make a real difference in
the next phase of this campaign. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190630-eoq?refcode=ema190630-25-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1001&refcode2=5486_5755789_Ic4Tti&akid=5486%2E5755789%2EIc4Tti ]Click here to add
a donation now.

We need a Democratic nominee who knows it’s time to turn the page and
start our next chapter. Someone who believes in the future we can build
together.

Here’s what I believe is in that next chapter:

I believe in an America where you only need one job to put a roof over
your head and food on the table.

I believe in an America where teachers are paid their value.

I believe in an America where no politician tells a woman what to do with
her body.

I believe in an America where health care is a right and not a privilege
for just those who can afford it.

I believe in an America where children do not have to go to school in fear
of a mass shooter.

I believe in an America where the president understands the greatest
strength and the greatest power any one individual can have is not to beat
people down -- but to lift them up.

If you believe in that America, I am asking you to join me in this fight.

We have to build a campaign with the strength to prosecute the case
against four more years of Donald Trump -- and fight for the next chapter
of our American story. It’s going to require all of us. Anything you can
contribute before tonight’s FEC deadline will make an enormous difference:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: Here’s how I see it: We need somebody on the debate stage in the general election who knows how to recognize a rap sheet when they see it and prosecute the case against four more years of Donald Trump. Someone who knows how to fight like hell for what we believe in -- and win. If you’re with me, I need you to pitch in to our campaign today. Whatever you can give before tonight’s FEC deadline will make a real difference in the next phase of this campaign. [ ]Click here to add a donation now. We need a Democratic nominee who knows it’s time to turn the page and start our next chapter. Someone who believes in the future we can build together. Here’s what I believe is in that next chapter: I believe in an America where you only need one job to put a roof over your head and food on the table. I believe in an America where teachers are paid their value. I believe in an America where no politician tells a woman what to do with her body. I believe in an America where health care is a right and not a privilege for just those who can afford it. I believe in an America where children do not have to go to school in fear of a mass shooter. I believe in an America where the president understands the greatest strength and the greatest power any one individual can have is not to beat people down -- but to lift them up. If you believe in that America, I am asking you to join me in this fight. We have to build a campaign with the strength to prosecute the case against four more years of Donald Trump -- and fight for the next chapter of our American story. It’s going to require all of us. Anything you can contribute before tonight’s FEC deadline will make an enormous difference: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]Chip in $5 now [ ]Chip in $25 now [ ]Chip in $50 now [ ]Chip in $100 now [ ]Chip in $250 now [ ]Another Amount Thank you for all you do, For The People, — Kamala Harris You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

Each day, my team has given me a list of the American Patriots who have stepped up to contribute to our critical FEC End-of-Quarter deadline.

Our End-of-Quarter deadline is absolutely paramount, and this is the LAST DAY to help us CRUSH OUR $3,000,000 GOAL. I'll be receiving the FINAL list of supporters tomorrow morning, and I want to see YOUR name at the very top.

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Derek and Mark
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
I'm writing to you now about my friend and colleague Senator Mark Warner. This message is particularly urgent because the National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC) -- the group charged with prot
|
---

| | | You are receiving this message because you're a critical member of the grassroots team that helped reelect me to the U.S. Senate. It would mean a lot if you'd show my friend and colleague Mark Warner, who represents our great Commonwealth alongside me in the Senate, the same support you showed me. If you'd prefer not to receive these emails though, you can unsubscribe [**here**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d246/53d9897e/51fca682/1c8f88ac/3712668093/VEsH/ "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe"). -- Tim
---
Derek --

I'm writing to you now about my friend and colleague Senator Mark Warner. This message is particularly urgent because **the National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC) -- the group charged with protecting the Republican majority -- is officially making Mark one of its targets**.
[](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d246/53d9897e/51fca682/1c8f88a8/3712668093/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-kaine?refcode=kainegrp3__116__&refcode2=photo1&amount=5")
---
Being a target of NRSC attacks means that before you know it, nasty attack ads will be all over the airwaves and the internet. It means Mark will really need our help to fight back by spreading his message across the Commonwealth.

But that's not all it means. It's also a reminder that DC Republicans have a very different idea about Virginians than you and I do. They seem to think Virginians want _more_ of the divisive Trump agenda -- more attacks on healthcare, on federal workers, and on our democratic values.

**I know they 're just plain wrong about this. But we need to show them exactly how wrong they are, Derek -- and the best way to do that is with a strong grassroots effort that proves Democrats have Mark Warner's back.**

**Are you in? Chip in now to show that you stand with Mark.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
****[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d246/53d9897e/51fca682/1c8f8895/3712668093/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-kaine?express_lane=true&refcode=kainegrp3__116__&refcode2=express_lane_1&amount=5")****

****[DONATE $25](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d246/53d9897e/51fca682/1c8f8893/3712668093/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-kaine?express_lane=true&refcode=kainegrp3__116__&refcode2=express_lane_3&amount=25")****
****[DONATE $50](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d246/53d9897e/51fca682/1c8f8892/3712668093/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-kaine?express_lane=true&refcode=kainegrp3__116__&refcode2=express_lane_4&amount=50")****
****[DONATE $100](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d246/53d9897e/51fca682/1c8f8891/3712668093/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-kaine?express_lane=true&refcode=kainegrp3__116__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100")****
****[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d246/53d9897e/51fca682/1c8f8890/3712668093/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-kaine?refcode=kainegrp3__116__&refcode2=express_lane_other")****
Thank you,
Tim Kaine

body:

---

| | Tonight is the first FEC deadline of the campaign, friend. We have to report our numbers publicly. That means that the media and our Republican opponents are watching closely.

We still need $4,625 in the door before midnight to reach our goal.

[**Chip in $25 or whatever you can to help us get there.**](https://conole.bsd. I'm counting on you to pull through for me one more time. | [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b522/18e32a7f/560b5212/7ba3087b/843541813/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190630_em_fr_b1_lujan_all_rs&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25")

name: Senator Marco Rubio
subject: Following up for Nicole
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nicole for New York (FEDERAL)
body:
You don't want to miss this.
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello there, I'm writing to ask you to support my friend, Nicole Malliotakis for Congress. Nicole is running in a district that is a must-win for Republicans in order take back the House of Representatives. Nicole's voice is desperately needed in Washington to help President Trump and I implement the 'America First' agenda and it is important that we help her campaign reach and beat their mid-year goal! We must show the media and her opponent that she is serious about taking back the 11th district. Although Nicole has the momentum, we can never take anything for granted and that's why your help, today, is imperative. Her last email had a tremendous response and we are now only $2670 and 59 individual donors from reaching our goal. Can you pitch in and help her finish the quarter strong?
---
| | | Click here to pitch in toward the goal!
---
| Nicole is counting on your support because she cannot do this alone. I hope you can help her blow this goal out of the water by the midnight deadline tonight!
---
| Thank you,
---
|
---
| Marco Rubio U.S. Senator, Florida

name: Key FEC Alert
subject: still not there
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress |
body:
We know your inbox is probably crowded right now,
Peter, so we’ll get right to the point.
We’re still not where we need to be ahead of tonight’s FEC
deadline.

All numbers will be made PUBLIC, so we can’t come up short.
Chip in right away!
( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-june19-eoq?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_190630_2_8&recurring=true&amount=10.00&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

Begin Forwarded Message:

*Every second from now until our FEC deadline at MIDNIGHT is
critical. We still need 93 supporters to donate $10 to meet our
goal. Can you chip in?*
( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-june19-eoq?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_190630_2_8&recurring=true&amount=10.00&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

Peter,

After our last email, a lot of you stepped up and chipped in
to help us meet our goal – you clearly see the threat Republicans
pose around the country and right here in California.

We know we’ve asked you for help on more than one occasion.
We need your help again ahead of tonight’s public FEC fundraising
deadline.
( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-june19-eoq?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_190630_2_8&recurring=true&amount=10.00&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

Don’t forget, Peter, these numbers
will be made PUBLIC in a matter of hours.

Republicans vying for office in competitive districts will
see.

Trump will see.

EVERYONE WILL SEE.

This is the time to show Republicans just how much we’re made
of. Please chip in whatever you can.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-june19-eoq
( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-june19-eoq?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_190630_2_8&recurring=true&amount=10.00&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

We appreciate all that you do!

Thompson for Congress HQ

Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He
represents California's 5th district in Congress, where he fights
for our healthcare and a clean environment every day. He cannot
continue to do his crucial work without the support of people
like you. Consider making a donation of any amount now.
( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thompson-emfooter?amount=15&recurring=true&refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_190630_2_8&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

We believe that communicating with our supporters is a vital
part of our campaign. However, if you want to keep supporting
Mike while receiving fewer emails, click here.
( https://act.myngp.com/forms/3106732701209070080 )

-------------------------------------------------------------
| Authorized & Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress |
-------------------------------------------------------------

Mike Thompson for Congress
PO Box 10541
Napa CA 94581 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no
longer receive email from us, please http://mikethompsonforcongress.ngpvanhost.com/unsubscribe?mmid=VnzRTywXYaTbFoQ2-b2goXg94iDknaYERZfzABwqLdY=&tiid=acS-Lrpt-C5HLS4m3oyBFoE9ncafkqr5-Y9bSQx5E1w=.

( ) We believe that communicating with our supporters is a vital part of our campaign. However, if you want to keep supporting Mike while receiving fewer emails, click here. And Nate Silver said that to even have a shot at winning the Senate, Democrats HAVE to flip Colorado. We hate to keep emailing... but there's a lot on the line here. name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: They're hell-bent on destroying the constitution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2a253/6cd27893/4e76627b/158086df/1055736248/VEsH/ "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | This week, five justices - including four appointed by presidents who lost the popular vote - gave Republicans the green light to keep gerrymandering elections so they can stay in control even when more people vote for Democrats. Today, let's respond by doubling down on our commitment to build another, even bigger blue wave. **[Donate $3 before tonight's end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. Let's get the job done in 2020.](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2a253/6cd27893/4e76627b/158086dc/1055736248/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2019-06-30-eoq&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100")** The conservative Court has been on a years-long binge to shred our Constitutional vision. This Supreme Court launched a wave of voter suppression and intimidation not seen since Jim Crow by gutting the Voting Rights Act. They destroyed Thomas Jefferson's "equal voice" principle by unleashing billions in dark money on our elections via _Citizens United_. And, now this week's blessing of radical partisan gerrymandering. These decisions create a trifecta of anti-democracy, skewing elections to the privileged and powerful. All of this means we need to work even harder, build an even more powerful grassroots tsunami. They're undermining our democracy and shredding our Constitution. Let's fight back. **[Please donate before the critical end-of-quarter deadline. Let's show Trump, McConnell, and their SuperPACs that we won't stand for their attacks on our constitutional vision- in our America, the people rule, not the special interests.](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2a253/6cd27893/4e76627b/158086dc/1055736248/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2019-06-30-eoq&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100")** **_Jeff_** Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2a253/6cd27893/4e76627b/158086dd/1055736248/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2019-06-30-eoq&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2a253/6cd27893/4e76627b/158086da/1055736248/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2019-06-30-eoq&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2a253/6cd27893/4e76627b/158086db/1055736248/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2019-06-30-eoq&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2a253/6cd27893/4e76627b/158086d8/1055736248/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2019-06-30-eoq&refcode2=express-buttons")

Nancy Pelosi is too! Pelosi is anxiously awaiting our fundraising numbers to see just how much money she’ll have to pump into Houston in an effort to buy our seat.

But you, friend, by chipping in can help send a message loud and clear to these far-left Dems. name: John Kasich
subject: Last day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
I have faith in the American people and continue awed by the incredible power of the people in this country who stand up and use their voices to call [ ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=3f1918bd9a954826a0efe1c35dee0fa5&_e=Vk4rBdO3C3UT1d9OhVmS7OtEzCbugacjux1q9trTwRuEmFPPbypjztkEDjeqTiMJuhL8a71W2gr9h2TwrF4oUdGnHwtLW3Ar70u7vy6ueczjz066WzMO_vSPn7QhxFkbsoiWJyWAOEkdUP5Ljc9HBu4wTV_pKNHNsXsv4-J44Xtc6vuI2fRJ_v0GT86InzlJAFIXtY8VwEJUkZtd4EPTHpuxrfub6cHrJpg2xUvYiRu9r4XYzay6Bj4ttmdOEg1b1M091Dgc_7syU_iqH1Ojng%3D%3D) | |
---
Peter - it's the last day before our mid-year fundraising deadline and [we could use your help](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=3f1918bd9a954826a0efe1c35dee0fa5&_e=Vk4rBdO3C3UT1d9OhVmS7ALS1yirMzPN1D3hcEvhsedVAEPC70n3avsKhWZZskUG_R_Ztaa7A44lxT_AJ-10x8nvv08oumngsXagKuBJQadZZ_hkIED2lYJp6jqYfXAkSnGpQSLo6ifPixbgO_yo_bw6hid9Cj3RBAEW3vuKkm95LqPIhfMlO8fRvUH7dKVL6RgS5scuXrRngbNg8Lcp6YPiwJFNTKNz_gAxd72J4LDZCH-IVYCBvPGSALgR42SxkYwApo4H2Z5MjnXsGQD4TQ%3D%3D).
**Mine is just one of many but I am doing what I can to be a voice of reason in chaotic times, calling for unity and statesmanship in America**.
It seems like the chasm in this country grows wider as our politics move further and further to the extremes, but with our collective actions, we are making a positive difference.
Where this path ultimately leads is uncertain at this time, but I will continue to be on the front lines fighting for our nation to heal our divisions and start addressing the many challenges we face.

Peter,
This has been a long week for candidates all across our country. We are working hard to find support from every corner in order to release the strongest numbers possible and show Republicans that we are not backing down.
There are just**8 hours until the end-of-quarter deadline** and I am asking for your help one more time. Here in TX-02, we have so much at stake, and with a representative like Dan Crenshaw, the most vulnerable members of our community will continue to be at risk.

We are only **$5,632** away from our reach goal this quarter and I know we can get there with folks like you stepping up today. I’m so grateful to have such strong grassroots supporters on our side.
**Chip in below to help flip TX-02. We have no primary opponent so every dollar goes straight to defeating Dan Crenshaw.**

| | | | | Peter — reaching out again before the FEC deadline @ midnight. I know we’ve been emailing a lot, but this is a crucial benchmark for our campaign since we’re going head-to-head with my opponents.

They’d love to see us fail, so we can’t let them catch us with a weak FEC report.

[**We have just $925 left to raise before midnight. Can you contribute now to help us reach our goal and report our strongest numbers?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7925709/75677161/-572411686?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGZhZGNmNS03NzliLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KnG-wCu2ZJzPkqPISApUJx6c6IZrCbul00tVBwtJYhA=&refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_190630_3_7&amount=10&recurring=true)

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: This is a stretch, but we’re going for it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
This is our chance to show everyone what we’re made of and how strong this grassroots campaign is. I want to be sure we do everything we can.
#
Tonight is our official FEC deadline. We’re trying to reach our online fundraising goal of $600,000 by midnight.
[We can’t allow ourselves to fall short on this one, and there’s not much time left. Can you make a donation of $3 to help us get there?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18024?refcode=ema20190630-39691&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=39691%2E444211%2E_9Hs9c)
[ ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18024?refcode=ema20190630-39691&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=39691%2E444211%2E_9Hs9c)
This is our chance to show everyone what we’re made of and how strong this grassroots campaign is. That we can run this race together -- entirely with people, not PACs. I want to be sure that we do everything we can tonight.
We are doing something historic for this country and the generations that follow ours. Thank you for being a part of it.
– Beto
**[Contribute](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18024?refcode=ema20190630-39691&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=39691%2E444211%2E_9Hs9c)**

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=22&akid=39691%2E444211%2E_9Hs9c). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

There is not much time left until the books close on this quarter and our numbers go public. Since the presidential campaigns are taking up so much oxygen, the GOP is hoping grassroots Democrats will sit out House races. It's never been more important to step up. Really counting on you, we rely on your support. Can you kick in a donation?

**[https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/june-eoq](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dws-june-eoq?refcode=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190630_2_10&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=2+-+httpssecuredebbiewassermanschultzcomjune&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190630_2_10&source=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190630_2_10")**

**\---Original Message---**
> | Hey, sorry to reach out so early, but we just left our morning meeting and we wanted you to see this right away:
>
> | **MONTH** | **GOAL** | **LEFT TO RAISE** | **CONTRIBUTION PAGE**
> ---|---|---|---
> **APRIL** | Surpassed | N/A | Inactive
> **MAY** | Surpassed | N/A | Inactive
> **JUNE** | **$8,000** | **$1,534** | [**CLICK HERE TO DONATE**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dws-june-eoq?refcode=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190630_2_10&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=3+-+CLICK+HERE+TO+DONATE&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190630_2_10&source=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190630_2_10")
>
> With the match in effect, there's no reason we shouldn't be able to make up this deficit before the books close at midnight and our numbers go public. Can you rush a donation right away to help hold the House?
>
> **[https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/june-eoq](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dws-june-eoq?refcode=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190630_2_10&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=4+-+httpssecuredebbiewassermanschultzcomjune&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190630_2_10&source=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190630_2_10")**
>
> If we miss the mark, the GOP and their backers will see we've come up short - and they'll ramp up spending against EVERY vulnerable House Democrat. We just have a few hours to make sure that doesn't happen. Hoping you can dig deep and help us close the gap.
>
> **[https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/june-eoq](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dws-june-eoq?refcode=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190630_2_10&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=5+-+httpssecuredebbiewassermanschultzcomjune&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190630_2_10&source=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190630_2_10")**

name: The Markey Campaign
subject: last hope
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Hello: Ed Markey is facing a major FEC deadline at midnight, and we're $5,000 short of our $25,000 goal.

Ed's last hope is online supporters like you to help us have the strongest FEC public report as possible.

_**[Will you click here to give $10 and help Ed fight for our progressive agenda?](http://ma.edmarkey. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-june2019-eoq?refcode=EM-063019_2&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

Here's Ed's email from earlier today:
* * *
> Hello - This is the last day of the quarter before we have to file our fundraising report with the FEC, _**[and I need to ask you to donate to my campaign to reach our $25,000 goal.](http://ma.edmarkey. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-june2019-eoq?refcode=EM-063019_2&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_ But here's why this is so important.
>
> Our fundraising numbers will be public on the FEC's website after tonight's deadline. National Republicans will be looking at it for any vulnerabilities in my campaign that they can exploit to defeat me.
>
> We can't get them any signs.
>
> Raising money through emails like this means we can show a massive team of grassroots supporters and make the GOP think twice about targeting me.
>
> [_**Right now we 're $8,404 short of our goal, and we only have until midnight to close the gap. Will you pitch in $10 or more before the FEC deadline and show you stand with me?**_](http://ma.edmarkey. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-june2019-eoq?refcode=EM-063019_2&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
