name: Brad Komar, Team Hickenlooper
subject: Tonight, we close the books on June.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
As crucial as Thursday's debate was to showing off John's unique advantages in this race, the fundraising numbers we post by tonight's reporting deadline are even more important. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771766/691c9bd/6d6575f1/11a416f6/3751364469/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

Tonight we close the books on our June fundraising, and the finance team can tell you: I've been checking in pretty frequently about how close we are to hitting our goals. (I'll be asking their forgiveness after the deadline.)

As crucial as Thursday's debate was to showing off John's unique perspectives in this race, **the fundraising numbers we post by tonight 's reporting deadline are _even more important._**

The media, political insiders, and other competitors will use these numbers to judge how seriously we can compete in this race--so we're relying on this team to show that we mean business.

**We 're still over $15,000 from the amount we need to hit by midnight to keep our summer plans on track. Can you help us close the gap by stepping up now?** ****[](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190630_BK_20190630-fr-BK-closethebooks-all_all_b1&recurring=auto&amounts=1,5,25,50,100,500&amount=1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****** ******[](https://secure.hickenlooper. name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Not great
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1957%2E150750%2Ek-PjGp)
Friends -

**First, the good news:**

This campaign is funded by a record number of contributions made by people of all backgrounds and from all communities — almost all small donations in the pursuit of big change.

**Now, the bad news:**

Last campaign, our average contribution was $27. You know that. This campaign, it’s significantly less. About $16 this month.

So what that means is we need A LOT more contributions before tonight’s FEC fundraising deadline ends at midnight. That’s the only way we can close the gap with our opponents begging for money at high-dollar fundraisers.

So we're asking:

[**Can Bernie count on you to make a $2.70 contribution to help us close the gap before our FEC fundraising deadline ends at midnight?**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/16037?refcode=em190630-2-90&t=26&akid=1957%2E150750%2Ek-PjGp)

You should be very proud of the way we are funding this campaign. Thanks for answering the call today. It’s an important day for our campaign.

In solidarity,

Faiz Shakir

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/16037?refcode=em190630-2-90&t=27&akid=1957%2E150750%2Ek-PjGp)

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=1957%2E150750%2Ek-PjGp). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=29&akid=1957%2E150750%2Ek-PjGp). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=30&refcode2=1957_150750_k-PjGp&akid=1957%2E150750%2Ek-PjGp).
Submit this form to [update your contact information](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/update-info/?t=31&akid=1957%2E150750%2Ek-PjGp).

name: Gov. Bill Weld
subject: ICYMI: We’re Almost There!
body:
|
---
With just hours before tonight's deadline for the critical mid-year [fundraising](https://www.weld2020.org/donate?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation&n=1) report, I wanted to be sure you saw this. Thanks! -Bill
* * *
Friend -- We are in the final stretch of our [fundraising](http://www.weld2020.org/donate?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation&n=2) reporting period! June 30th is the end of the quarter and media, pundits, and pollsters will judge the viability of this campaign by the numbers we report.[ I NEED YOUR HELP!!](http://www.weld2020.org/donate?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation&n=3) We are only $53,575 away from hitting our goal! Your [contribution of $12, $26, $47, or $112](http://www.weld2020.org/donate?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation&n=4) dollars will help us reach this. Please [consider giving today](http://www.weld2020.org/donate?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation&n=5) and let's send President Trump a message that AMERICA DESERVES BETTER. Wednesday and Thursday nights’ Democratic Debates made one thing clear: Millions of Americans who aren’t happy with Donald Trump as their President are not going to find the alternative they want in the Democratic field. [With your help](http://www.weld2020.org/donate?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation&n=6), we ARE offering them a real choice. You deserve better. AMERICA deserves better. Help me [send a message to the White House](http://www.weld2020.org/donate?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation&n=7) and to the country. Contribute today! -Bill
[](https://www.weld2020.org/?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation&n=8)
[](http://www.weld2020.org/?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation&n=9)
Weld 2020 · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.weld2020.org/unsubscribe?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation&n=10).
You can also keep up with Weld 2020 on [Twitter](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation&n=11) or [Facebook](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation&n=12).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation&n=13), software for leaders.

name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: Do you support open borders?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kinzinger for Congress
body:
| [ ](www.electadam.com)
---
Friend, Did you catch the Democrat debates this week? If so, you know **the Democrats are now openly embracing socialism and open borders**. They're not even trying to hide it anymore. It truly is alarming for those of us who love America's freedoms and hold common-sense conservative values. These issues, along with our nation's future, will be on the ballot in 2020. **Many Democrats, fueled by their hatred of President Trump, are energized like never before to take back the White House and both chambers of Congress.** We'll have quite a fight on our hands -- especially here in Illinois -- and we've got to be ready if we're going to halt the Democrats' march toward socialism and open borders. **I'm going to continue working for the people who sent me to Washington.** That's why I need your support to ensure we keep the values that have made us the greatest nation to ever grace this Earth. Will you join me right now? [I'M WITH YOU, ADAM! GET TO WORK >>](https://www.electadam.com/support?e=6d68a9acc7ac3c9a641bdf5d2966b0b3&utm_source=electadam&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2nd_quarter_immigration&n=1) I need your help as soon as possible. [With a small donation before the major end of quarter deadline](https://www.electadam.com/support?e=6d68a9acc7ac3c9a641bdf5d2966b0b3&utm_source=electadam&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2nd_quarter_immigration&n=2) (at midnight tonight), you can show that the will of the American people is more powerful than any political party. Now is the time for all freedom-loving people to stand up for our nation and her values and say "NO" to socialism and open borders. I hope you agree, and I hope I can count on your support.

Sincerely, Adam
| [ ](https://www.future1st.us/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6vqT3OpPWah76AO06wwwFqJ-xxr4keELV2d4JdHAmLhp&e=6d68a9acc7ac3c9a641bdf5d2966b0b3&utm_source=electadam&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2nd_quarter_immigration&n=3) [ ](https://www.future1st.us/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNCDBgQphekXkJc2K3uZrHWcCkDncOztAEg2HCUvnwt8g&e=6d68a9acc7ac3c9a641bdf5d2966b0b3&utm_source=electadam&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2nd_quarter_immigration&n=4)
---
Paid for by Kinzinger for Congress
Kinzinger for Congress · PO Box 2365, Ottawa, IL 61350, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.future1st.us/unsubscribe?e=6d68a9acc7ac3c9a641bdf5d2966b0b3&utm_source=electadam&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2nd_quarter_immigration&n=5).
You can also keep up with Adam Kinzinger on [Twitter](https://www.future1st.us/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNCDBgQphekXkJc2K3uZrHWcCkDncOztAEg2HCUvnwt8g&e=6d68a9acc7ac3c9a641bdf5d2966b0b3&utm_source=electadam&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2nd_quarter_immigration&n=6) or [Facebook](https://www.future1st.us/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6vqT3OpPWah76AO06wwwFqJ-xxr4keELV2d4JdHAmLhp&e=6d68a9acc7ac3c9a641bdf5d2966b0b3&utm_source=electadam&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2nd_quarter_immigration&n=7).

name: Jim
subject: Tonight’s deadline
body:
I'll come right out and say it -- we have our June end-of-quarter fundraising deadline tonight, and I need your help. Friend,

I'll come right out and say it -- we have our June end-of-quarter fundraising deadline **tonight** , and I need your help.

In everything I've done as district attorney and as attorney general, I've put Mississippi families first. And as governor, I will set priorities that will continue to move our great state forward and make it a better place for all Mississippians.

I know November might seem far away, but these fundraising deadlines have a real impact on this campaign. Our team is working hard every day to spread our vision for Mississippi to every corner of this state. And I know that with your support, we can win this race. [**Will you contribute now to help us reach our goal?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gzEMIjfXS48BlTK6SwIhFaqwhiUu5XZT98AveajHIhU=/qPwhn3VkARDgRuoDBwTGreXR5Ra09SIPSPvDE1nMnXc=?refcode=20190630nd&amount=10)

Thank you,
Jim Hood | |

---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/gzEMIjfXS48BlTK6SwIhFaqwhiUu5XZT98AveajHIhU=/4oiJGlkR-wDnxPr9vKZTpMCR0TwqwXGCpIT-q3iAKzI=). Friends of Jim Hood
P.O. Box 16647
Jackson MS 39236 United States
********** **********

name: Trent Bolger
subject: We're almost there, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
#
Team,
Wilmot is in this race because he's ready to go to the Senate to fight for our values and our future. But he can't win this on his own. We've all got a part to play to send Wilmot to D.C.
It's going to take a lot of resources to campaign in a state as big as Montana, but if our supporters step up, we won't have to worry about how to travel the state to meet with voters, get our message out over the airwaves, and keep the lights on back at campaign headquarters.
**[We're so close to meeting our goal, but we still need you to contribute before the FEC deadline. This is your chance to own a piece of this campaign. subject: New York Times just announced:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
The New York Times just reported that Julian was the winner of the first Democratic debate! | | |
---
| |
---
| | Everything just changed:

The New York Times just reported that Julian was the winner of the first Democratic debate!

_**[Will you chip in $15 before his End of Quarter Deadline at midnight to prove to everyone who counted him out that we have what it takes to win? >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcdb1/3eb3e2fc/453e0f92/744ac22a/2119110032/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190630_em_fr_b2_brv_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=15")**_

We know the media doesn't give Julian as much attention as the other candidates.

We know the establishment counts him out as an underdog.

But Julian has ALWAYS beaten the odds throughout his life.

And now, even the New York Times is applauding his debate performance.

He spoke for immigrant kids. He spoke for kids of single parents.

He spoke for everyone who grew up in a town where it's hard to get ahead.

And he made it clear: When he's President, he won't leave anyone behind.

This End of Quarter Deadline at midnight is the most important of Julian's campaign. Can you chip in $15 before midnight to have Julian's' back -- and prove to everyone who counted this campaign out that we have what it takes?

| | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the first debates and send him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must reach 130,000 donors this summer to secure his spot on the Democratic debate stage.

Julian hasn't qualified yet, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money. Will you help him get there?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcdb1/3eb3e2fc/453e0f92/744ac212/2119110032/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcdb1/3eb3e2fc/453e0f92/744ac211/2119110032/VEsHBA/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcdb1/3eb3e2fc/453e0f92/744ac210/2119110032/VEsHBw/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

clean_body: The New York Times just reported that Julian was the winner of the first Democratic debate! | | | | | | | Everything just changed: The New York Times just reported that Julian was the winner of the first Democratic debate! "" We know the media doesn't give Julian as much attention as the other candidates. We know the establishment counts him out as an underdog. But Julian has ALWAYS beaten the odds throughout his life. And now, even the New York Times is applauding his debate performance. He spoke for immigrant kids. He spoke for kids of single parents. He spoke for everyone who grew up in a town where it's hard to get ahead. And he made it clear: When he's President, he won't leave anyone behind. This End of Quarter Deadline at midnight is the most important of Julian's campaign. Can you chip in $15 before midnight to have Julian's' back -- and prove to everyone who counted this campaign out that we have what it takes? | | "" "" "" "" "" Thank you, Team Julian | | | | | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | julianforthefuture.com | | Paid for by Julian for the Future | Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper. Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the first debates and send him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates. We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge: Julian must reach 130,000 donors this summer to secure his spot on the Democratic debate stage. Julian hasn't qualified yet, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money. Will you help him get there? "" Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know "". If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe "", and we'll make sure to process your request.

I’ve been running the numbers all morning and I’ve never seen anything
like this before. Since Kamala crushed the debate on Thursday, tens of
thousands of people have stepped up to donate to our campaign -- it’s
truly remarkable.

We don’t have much time to capture this energy before the clock runs out
on our FEC deadline at midnight -- so that’s why I’m asking:

body:

| Patriot,
I wanted to make sure you saw Matt's invitation to the Fight for Florida club!
You need to know the truth, patriot, Matt loves Florida and our country more than anything. We have seen him stand up for your rights in Congress, we have seen him fight to shine light on the truth about the radical left agenda, and we have NEVER seen him back down until justice was served.
He fights day and night to keep you safe. He doesn't care how much Democrats push back, his main concern is the safety of the American people and he will not rest until the wall is built.
With you by his side, Matt will be unstoppable! So please, don't let this opportunity pass you by. We only have a few hours left to reach our end-of-quarter goal. With [$1,145](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qVm7DP2FY1QPBYnHyHl-3y9UM5cxc010HyyfC9dUyfqrcbnE5J3nN22ym-8Jh3zAKJE2xFs38AuIXb7HJ8Lr6yG2rPgIm0PzhJj1EzOjxch1y8085MbxUGFMyegUpaHx6GZFjUIZLQV1beblxl5Bu4u_Lo3dq1h0AgYWfDutRwAH5CTX-m3JrtR25uxjT_Q5&c=Sj_zLrErY0qVeZXD0c5xhrA-hFTKEnYlzqbI6AkIvhNA5VC9egeW0g==&ch=cVFIgOVMo1aeQNl_9ZY6IanXxYJVocWpNzS6UQF6Txc03o9aiuZCYA==) to go, a [donation of $50](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qVm7DP2FY1QPBYnHyHl-3y9UM5cxc010HyyfC9dUyfqrcbnE5J3nN22ym-8Jh3zAKJE2xFs38AuIXb7HJ8Lr6yG2rPgIm0PzhJj1EzOjxch1y8085MbxUGFMyegUpaHx6GZFjUIZLQV1beblxl5Bu4u_Lo3dq1h0AgYWfDutRwAH5CTX-m3JrtR25uxjT_Q5&c=Sj_zLrErY0qVeZXD0c5xhrA-hFTKEnYlzqbI6AkIvhNA5VC9egeW0g==&ch=cVFIgOVMo1aeQNl_9ZY6IanXxYJVocWpNzS6UQF6Txc03o9aiuZCYA==) can go a long way!
What do you say, will you join the fight?

| Patriot,
This is sensitive information. Can we keep this between us?
I want to invite you to be part of my Fight for Florida club. While Democrats are teaming up with lobbyists and special interest groups to receive millions in funding, I am reaching out to you!
I am not interested in having the support of the elite in Washington, I am interested in having YOUR support. I came to Congress to represent YOU and to fight for Florida. To do this, I need your help...
With millions of dollars being dumped by the radical left to silence our conservative voices and turn this country socialists, we must stick together to fight back and WIN! Are you with me?

He fights day and night to keep you safe. He doesn't care how much Democrats push back, his main concern is the safety of the American people and he will not rest until the wall is built. With you by his side, Matt will be unstoppable! So please, don't let this opportunity pass you by. We only have a few hours left to reach our end-of-quarter goal. With == to go, a == can go a long way! What do you say, will you join the fight? | | | == | I hope we can count on you, patriot, Team Gaetz \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Matt Gaetz <mailto:info@davidyoungforiowa.com> Date: Sun, Jun 30, 2019 at 10:30 AM Subject: Fwd: Urgent: Can You Keep A Secret? To: Team Gaetz | Patriot, This is sensitive information. Can we keep this between us? I want to invite you to be part of my Fight for Florida club. While Democrats are teaming up with lobbyists and special interest groups to receive millions in funding, I am reaching out to you! I am not interested in having the support of the elite in Washington, I am interested in having YOUR support. I came to Congress to represent YOU and to fight for Florida. To do this, I need your help... With millions of dollars being dumped by the radical left to silence our conservative voices and turn this country socialists, we must stick together to fight back and WIN! Are you with me? | | | == | | | == | | | == | I have one mission, PUT AMERICA FIRST! This means, protect our borders, fix our broken immigration system, take care of our environment, and STOP the political games. What the Democrats fail to understand is that the American people are not interested in political agendas or baseless witch hunts, they are interested in a healthy economy, affordable healthcare, secure borders, and the TRUTH! So what do you say? While Democrats keep digging themselves into a bigger hole by ignoring the needs of the American people to push their socialist agenda, will you join my fight to put America first? | | | == | Together, we will keep Florida the best state in America. Together, we will stop the political games and start putting America first. Together, we will keep America great! | For Florida and America, | | Matt Gaetz P.S. - We have less than 48 hours to hit our end-of-quarter mark. Don't keep waiting, ==! | | | == == | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ | Copyright (C) 2019 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. You are receiving this email because you opted in at our website. Friends of Matt Gaetz | == | | Friends of Matt Gaetz | PO Box 168, Mary Ester, FL 32569 | | Sent by mailto:info@mattgaetzforflorida.com

name: Bennet for America
subject: this would really help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
Team,

I'll be honest, when I announced my candidacy for president, the cable news shows said our campaign didn't have a chance -- they said we wouldn't even make the first debate.

Now they're calling me one of Thursday night's winners!

Thanks to your support, I took the stage in Miami and shared how we're going to end Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell's three-ring-circus approach and restore integrity to our government.

But now we need to prove the doubters wrong again.

Right now, I'm counting on friends like you for help before our campaign's first FEC fundraising deadline. We only have until midnight.

I'm asking you, Team, because right now a group of grassroots supporters are generously matching donations that will DOUBLE your impact to show that we can take on powerful special interests and WIN.

RUSH A 2X-MATCHED DONATION >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption

As a Senator from Colorado -- a purple state -- I've never known an easy election and I've learned how to work across the aisle to create solutions that benefit everyone.

But for 10 years our government has been locked in the Tea Party-Freedom Caucus stranglehold, and I know that Mitch McConnell doesn't do "give-and-take" unless he's taking everything.

These times demand bold action and ambitious solutions for the serious challenges our country is facing. But I can't do it without your support -- and the help of thousands of people like you.

So that's why I'm asking, Team, will you step up now and rush a matched donation? Any amount you can give - $3, $5, or even $25 - will double your impact to fuel this campaign >>

CHIP IN $1 NOW >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption
CHIP IN $5 NOW >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption
CHIP IN $15 NOW >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption
CHIP IN $25 NOW >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption
CHIP IN $50 NOW >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption

Michael

subject: So incredibly close
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
I'm running to defeat Matt Bevin because Kentucky deserves an honest governor who will fight for transparency and lead with decency. But getting there won't be easy.
|
---
| | Hi Peter, I'm running to defeat Matt Bevin because Kentucky deserves an honest governor who will fight for transparency and lead with decency. But getting there won't be easy.

Meg, my finance director, just called and told me she had some bad news and some good news.

The bad news is we're still fifty donors short of meeting our end-of-month goal.

The good news is we're so incredibly close to meeting it! We just need one last push... and we're there!

Can you chip in now to help us finish this month strong? **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-june2019eoqnd](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b56/ad6dc73/1578b21d/db4146f/4041238904/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0OCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-june2019eoqnd?refcode=20190630nd__148__&amount=5")**

name: Team Beto
subject: Unsafe, inhumane, unsanitary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
This isn’t a fundraising email, and we’re not writing to you about tonight’s FEC deadline either. But it’s one of the most important emails you’ll receive today.
#
This isn’t a fundraising email, and we’re not writing to you about tonight’s FEC deadline either. But it’s one of the most important emails you’ll receive today.
At the Clint Border Facility in Clint, TX — just outside of El Paso — more than 100 children are being detained in conditions so unsafe and inhumane that it’s being called “a public health crisis.” Children caring for other children, sleeping on concrete floors, and lacking the most basic care and supplies like toothbrushes, soap, or beds. This is happening, right now, _in our nation’s name_ and _under our government’s watch._
Conventional wisdom tells us that today we should be hosting big fundraising events and making phone calls to donors. But this is a human rights crisis that demands immediate action. These children deserve respect, dignity, and humane living conditions. Moving them out of these facilities quickly, providing them adequate shelter and support, and uniting them with family members should be this administration’s immediate priority.
That’s why Beto just held a rally outside of the facility with political leaders and activists from all over the country to demand that this mistreatment of children — as well as the separating of families and indefinite detainment of immigrants — immediately end.
We’re asking you to make a donation — not to our campaign, **but to the Diocesan Migrant & Refugee Services of El Paso.** They’re an incredible organization that provides legal services for adults and unaccompanied immigrant children in the local immigration detention centers and shelters. **100% of your contribution will go to them. You can chip in here:** [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/diocesan-migrant-refugee-services](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/diocesan-migrant-refugee-services?refcode=beto-ema-20190630&)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/diocesan-migrant-refugee-services?refcode=beto-ema-20190630&)**
Last year, on Father’s Day, Beto led a march to raise awareness about the mistreatment and detention of children at the Tornillo facility in El Paso, where thousands of migrants were being detained. He continued to return to the camp until all of the children were successfully released and the facility was shut down.
**This crisis in Clint, TX demands our attention now.** And as the current administration launches cruel attack after cruel attack upon immigrants, asylum seekers, and children, we must continue to fight.
Thank you,
Team Beto

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=39722%2E444211%2ExlAWeM). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

body:
Hitting our party's end-of-quarter goal before midnight is critical to staying on track to win the White House and seats nationwide.
---
I am asking you to please donate to the DNC before tonight's critical end-of-quarter deadline.

Donald Trump is the most reckless and unethical president we've seen in recent history, Derek. In the past two weeks alone he has shown his worst qualities by:
* Threatening war with Iran, bragging that it would be over quickly, and saying no exit strategy is even required;
* Defending the inhumane conditions at our border for detained children, many of whom have been forced to sleep on concrete floors with aluminum blankets;
* Saying that he may again accept assistance from a foreign power if they offer him dirt on his opponents.

We have the power to elect better leadership, from local office all the way up to the Oval Office in 2020. That will only happen if we come together now to build the strong party infrastructure it will take to defeat Donald Trump and his Republican allies.

What the Democratic Party is able to raise by midnight _tonight_ , its quarterly FEC deadline, will determine just how strong that foundation is -- so, I'm asking:

**Donate $3 to the One-Term President Fund before midnight. Every penny will go directly toward building out the party infrastructure required to defeat Trump and the GOP in 2020.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40526b2c/4067b0a/797b30bb2/7f30164f/2292685782/VEsFAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/as-june-deadline-2019?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=35+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20190630_as_150_day&source=em_20190630_as_150_day&refcode=em_20190630_as_150_day")
[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40526b2c/4067b0a/797b30bb2/7f30164c/2292685782/VEsFAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/as-june-deadline-2019?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=36+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20190630_as_150_day&source=em_20190630_as_150_day&refcode=em_20190630_as_150_day")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40526b2c/4067b0a/797b30bb2/7f30164d/2292685782/VEsFAg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/as-june-deadline-2019?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=37+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20190630_as_150_day&source=em_20190630_as_150_day&refcode=em_20190630_as_150_day")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40526b2c/4067b0a/797b30bb2/7f30164a/2292685782/VEsFDQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/as-june-deadline-2019?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=38+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20190630_as_150_day&source=em_20190630_as_150_day&refcode=em_20190630_as_150_day")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40526b2c/4067b0a/797b30bb2/7f30164b/2292685782/VEsFDA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/as-june-deadline-2019?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=39+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20190630_as_150_day&source=em_20190630_as_150_day&refcode=em_20190630_as_150_day")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40526b2c/4067b0a/797b30bb2/7f301648/2292685782/VEsCBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/as-june-deadline-2019?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=40+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20190630_as_150_day&source=em_20190630_as_150_day&refcode=em_20190630_as_150_day")
** When Trump relaunched his campaign, _he raised over $24 million in just 24 hours_. He and the RNC's fundraising machine have already raked in over $100 million this year, and we have to keep pace to give our eventual nominee and down-ballot Democrats a fair shot at victory in 2020.

**The DNC is the _only_ official party organization tasked with helping our eventual nominee defeat Trump and restore sanity and dignity to the Oval Office.** Hitting our party's end-of-quarter goal before midnight is critical to staying on track to win the White House and seats nationwide.

**[We're counting on you, Derek. Contribute $3 to the One-Term President Fund before tonight's midnight deadline to help defeat Donald Trump and win seats up and down the ballot next year.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40526b2c/4067b0a/797b30bb2/7f301649/2292685782/VEsCBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/as-june-deadline-2019?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=41+-+Were+counting+on+youCUSTOMDATASETslugwhi&utm_campaign=em_20190630_as_150_day&source=em_20190630_as_150_day&refcode=em_20190630_as_150_day")**

Thanks for standing with Democrats ahead of tonight's deadline. It means the world.

Adam

Adam Schiff
U.S. Representative, CA-28

If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, [**submit this form to unsubscribe**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40526b2c/4067b0a/797b30bb2/7f301656/2292685782/VEsCBw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/unsubscribe-signup?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=42+-+submit+this+form+to+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em_20190630_as_150_day&refcode=em_20190630_as_150_day").

If you'd only like to receive our most important messages, [**sign up to receive less email**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40526b2c/4067b0a/797b30bb2/7f301657/2292685782/VEsCBg/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/less-email-signup?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=43+-+sign+up+to+receive+less+email&utm_campaign=em_20190630_as_150_day&refcode=em_20190630_as_150_day") or opt in to our SMS program by [**signing up to receive text messages**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40526b2c/4067b0a/797b30bb2/7f301654/2292685782/VEsCAQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/texting-signup?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=44+-+signing+up+to+receive+text+messages&utm_campaign=em_20190630_as_150_day&refcode=em_20190630_as_150_day").

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't your preferred email address, [**update your contact information**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40526b2c/4067b0a/797b30bb2/7f301655/2292685782/VEsCAA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/update-info-dnc?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=45+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20190630_as_150_day&refcode=em_20190630_as_150_day"). If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, [**make a contribution today**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40526b2c/4067b0a/797b30bb2/7f301652/2292685782/VEsCAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-email-footer?refcode=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=46+-+make+a+contribution+today&utm_campaign=em_20190630_as_150_day&source=em_20190630_as_150_day"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Just reply to this email to send any comments, criticisms, or feedback. Our community management team reads every message from supporters like you. Thanks for supporting our party!

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www.Democrats.org](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40526b2c/4067b0a/797b30bb2/7f301653/2292685782/VEsCAg/ "https://democrats.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=47+-+wwwDemocratsorg&utm_campaign=em_20190630_as_150_day&source=em_20190630_as_150_day&refcode=em_20190630_as_150_day"), and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Rocky Saligram
subject: Good news for you! Fw: Today is the last day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Thanks to all your help, we are just $723.94 away from our end-of-month goal! We've got a couple hours left before we have to close the books.

This is our biggest deadline yet, and it's very important that we meet this goal. **[Will you help us and chip in before midnight tonight?](https://act.myngp.com/el/3B1rCOn-N3EgqMRTd4SdZ8hhANqbl0ZLODaemhoIMqc=/jnHj0HOxbfsV-bYhaIh_-YKpemZW76hpY7d3nZPX_Zc=?refcode=0630eoq2)**

Thanks again for all you do for our campaign!

Rocky Saligram, Deputy Finance Director
Sri for Congress

* * *
From: Sri Preston Kulkarni
Sent: Sunday, June 30, 2019
Subject: Today is the last day!

Hey ya'll, Sri here in the office trying to make last minute calls. Our fundraising deadline is TODAY at midnight and we are just over $9,000 short of passing the #1 race in the country from last quarter.

Anything you can do on the last day will help. I'll be here until midnight, so please do what you can and share with friends.

Here is the secure link:
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sri2020_email_062019?refcode=0630eoq1](https://act.myngp.com/el/3B1rCOn-N3EgqMRTd4SdZ8hhANqbl0ZLODaemhoIMqc=/jnHj0HOxbfsV-bYhaIh_-YKpemZW76hpY7d3nZPX_Zc=?refcode=0630eoq1)**

Thank you!
Sri Preston Kulkarni

(Sent from Sri's iPhone)

* * *

Paid for by Sri for Congress.
---
Sri for Congress
PO Box 898
Sugar Land TX 77478 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/3B1rCOn-N3EgqMRTd4SdZ8hhANqbl0ZLODaemhoIMqc=/xZ_azz5t1jO5629Q8DyBNPsXZ20rFzfoe1uuZH_B440=).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: It's not too late
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaTurner for Senate
body:
The FEC mandated End of Quarter fundraising deadline is tonight.That’s when each federal campaign must file a report with the FEC. | | |
---
| | The FEC mandated End of Quarter fundraising deadline is tonight at midnight.

That's when each federal campaign must file a report with the FEC showing all contributions and expenditures made through the end of the second quarter.

A few days later, when the FEC makes the reports publicly available, the Democrats, media, pollsters, and potential new donors and supporters will use them as a way to gauge the strength of each campaign.

[That's why I'm counting on your immediate support to help make sure we finish the quarter strong.](https://laturnerforsenate.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=66e1e33aabb963218c502c41e&id=4e8c8cda1f&e=6882b657f8)

_**As one of the only 4 open U.S. Senate seats up for grabs in 2020, the entire nation is watching Kansas, and waiting on the results of our report. **_

A strong report will signal that conservatives are more determined than ever to Drain the Swamp and fight for Trump's America First Agenda in Washington.

So, please.

[Step up for our conservative values and chip in a donation of $500, $250, $150, $100, $75, $50, $25, or even $10 to our campaign before the End of Quarter deadline.](https://laturnerforsenate.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=66e1e33aabb963218c502c41e&id=c9e1b63309&e=6882b657f8)

Even if it's just $5, all I ask is that you please do all you can to help me finish the quarter strong.

I'm counting on you.

[So please, click HERE to chip in a donation.](https://laturnerforsenate.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=66e1e33aabb963218c502c41e&id=e02dd96201&e=6882b657f8)

Thank you in advance for your support.

Yours in the fight,
Jake
---
| [Donate Now](https://laturnerforsenate.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=66e1e33aabb963218c502c41e&id=2dfed4e88a&e=6882b657f8 "Donate Now")
---

---

LaTurner for SenatePO Box 67237Topeka, KS 66667-0237

Yours in the fight, Jake | "Donate Now" | | | Paid for by LaTurner for Senate | Copyright © 2019 LaTurner for Senate, All rights reserved.

subject: This is my final email of the weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger For Congress
body:
We are still working to close out the quarter strong and need to raise another $3,700 by midnight to reach our goals.
| | Dear Peter,

We asked for a lot of help this weekend, and so many of you delivered! Thank you!

We are still working to close out the quarter strong and need to raise another $3,700 by midnight to reach our goals. To everyone who has contributed, thank you so much for your support.

If you haven't contributed and are able to, here is a link:

[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/spanbergerq22019**](https://act.myngp.com/el/GlvAJSgZ3XWngpUBVMSJGt5kxIxtFmQy4G1cIhRh0vw=/T2lF_QcYvXiYKZ_W4t0mcM1jEGWtNeoFXgXF3eUqj1w=?refcode=em_fr_2019.06.30_b2_as_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)

I hope you have a wonderful 4th of July week!

With appreciation,

_Abigail_

Hey Peter,

Did you get a chance to read Elisa’s email earlier today? Since this afternoon we’ve made a ton of progress and are only **$609** away from reaching our goal. Taking on Dan Crenshaw is an ambitious goal, so we’re running an ambitious race. To do that, we need real funds so Elisa can criss-cross our district.

**[Can I count on you to chip in tonight before our 10:59 pm CST deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7929177/75723581/-1594214468?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmM5YzIxMy05ODliLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w1UbIPhMqgqGAyuFrv9Gf7a-68fN-9rKsQk9OzGjutI=&refcode=email)**

Thank you so much for your support. Truly appreciate it.

Best,
Nick Meier
Campaign Manager

From: Elisa <info@elisacardnell.com>
Date: Sun, Jun 30, 2019
Subject: Tonight’s Deadline
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Peter,
This has been a long week for candidates all across our country. We are working hard to find support from every corner in order to release the strongest numbers possible and show Republicans that we are not backing down.
There are just**8 hours until the end-of-quarter deadline** and I am asking for your help one more time. Here in TX-02, we have so much at stake, and with a representative like Dan Crenshaw, the most vulnerable members of our community will continue to be at risk.

We are only **$5,632** away from our reach goal this quarter and I know we can get there with folks like you stepping up today. I’m so grateful to have such strong grassroots supporters on our side.
**Chip in below to help flip TX-02. We have no primary opponent so every dollar goes straight to defeating Dan Crenshaw.**

name: Cooper for NC
subject: Roy's note (urgent)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
|
---
[ ](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1200379/2fde7c66/4a7cddb1/1568eccd/2738159514/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cooper-email-logo?refcode=logo")

| | | Hi, Peter,

Did you see Roy's note from today? If you haven't seen it yet, we're bumping it to the top of your inbox.

With so many requests for support flooding in from strong Democratic candidates and progressive organizations right now, we understand how you may have missed Roy's request.

**But, here 's why it's super important you take action today:**

**Roy is in a dead-heat with Dan Forest according to the latest polls, it 's a statistical tie right now. And the national Republican machine, along with right-wing special interests, are laser-focused on defeating Roy next year.**

[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1200379/2fde7c66/4a7cddb1/1568eccc/2738159514/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiUGV0ZXIiLCJKU1ZNWVhOMGJtRnRaU1VsIjoiIiwiZTN0aGMydDlmUT09IjoiMTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cooper-june-df?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=063019_60D_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=")
The North Carolina Governor's race will be a battleground next year. Republicans know it - and they're going to throw everything at us in the weeks ahead.

_**[Will you help Roy continuing fighting for Democrats in 2020?](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1200379/2fde7c66/4a7cddb1/1568eccf/2738159514/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiUGV0ZXIiLCJKU1ZNWVhOMGJtRnRaU1VsIjoiIiwiZTN0aGMydDlmUT09IjoiMTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cooper-june-df?refcode=063019_click_1&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=")**_

**[RUSH A DONATION>>](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1200379/2fde7c66/4a7cddb1/1568eccc/2738159514/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiUGV0ZXIiLCJKU1ZNWVhOMGJtRnRaU1VsIjoiIiwiZTN0aGMydDlmUT09IjoiMTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cooper-june-df?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=063019_60D_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=")**
* * *
Peter,

I'm proud of the progress we've made together over the past two years.

Whether it's working to expand Medicaid, protecting a woman's right to make her own health choices, ordering a state strategy to fight climate change, insisting on more funding for education, instituting paid parental leave for state employees, appointing the most diverse cabinet in the history of our state along with smart, diverse, independent judges, strengthening civil rights for the LGBTQ community, tackling the opioid epidemic - **our agenda is moving North Carolina forward.**

**But, Peter, our progress is maddening to the far-right. If they could get their way, they 'd gut what we've achieved.**

We still have a lot to do. We can't rest, particularly in the face of the growing attacks from our right-wing opponents. I'm working hard, but I need your help.

With so many requests for support flooding in from strong Democratic candidates and progressive organizations right now, we understand how you may have missed Roy's request. But, here 's why it's super important you take action today: Roy is in a dead-heat with Dan Forest according to the latest polls, it 's a statistical tie right now. name: Team Warren
subject: This is why tonight's deadline matters (a lot)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
After tonight, all of the presidential candidates will put together reports on how much they've raised in the second quarter of 2019 -- from April 1 through June 30. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ece9/45c30650/17d25912f/669ddb9d/2767900868/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
[**In this email, we're going to ask if you can make a contribution before tonight's FEC fundraising deadline.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ece9/45c30650/17d25912f/669ddb9c/2767900868/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWp1bjE5ZW9xIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDYzMGVtMy1lb3EtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-jun19eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190630em3-eoq-full")

But first, we want to take a second to talk about why this deadline matters (a lot).

After tonight, all of the presidential candidates will put together reports on how much they've raised in the second quarter of 2019 -- from April 1 through June 30.

Every campaign will submit those reports to the Federal Election Commission (FEC) and then release those reports to the public.

**You know who'll pay special attention to Elizabeth's fundraising report?**

**Political reporters and pundits** -- to see whether there's wide support for our bold plans to level the playing field for working people.

**And powerful special interests** -- to see whether we're actually building a grassroots movement that'll be strong enough to put power in the hands of the people.

**They will judge how strong we are. So let's show our strength.

Thank you for everything you already do to make this campaign possible. If you're able, please make a donation right now to help make our report as strong as possible before tonight's FEC deadline.**

name: mike thompson (personal)
subject: quick --
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress |
body:
Peter – Time is quickly running out
ahead of our critical FEC deadline, and we’re still coming up
about 40 donations short.

Can I count on your support? We have to show that we’re
backing all vulnerable House Democrats.

Here’s a secure link from the team:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-june19-eoq
( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-june19-eoq?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_190630_3_9&recurring=true&amount=10.00&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

Thanks for all you do,

Mike

Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He
represents California's 5th district in Congress, where he fights
for our healthcare and a clean environment every day. He cannot

Once the FEC deadline closes at midnight tonight, you can bet they’ll pore

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: important hurdle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
#
Just getting home after the rally we held outside the Clint Border Patrol facility. At the same time that I am so angry and heartbroken about Trump’s cruel treatment of children, I am also filled with hope that -- together -- we can transcend any injustice, any obstacle. Seeing everyone out there in the heat today reminded me that working together, we can keep the pressure on and secure change.
That’s really what this campaign is all about -- bringing people in, bringing people together, and building a new kind of politics that will overcome each of the challenges before us as a country. But if we want this kind of campaign to succeed, we have to meet each one of our goals. Tonight is our official FEC deadline, and we’re working hard to raise $600,000 online by midnight.
[We can’t fall short. There are only a handful of hours left. Can I count on your support before our FEC deadline at midnight tonight? Any amount you can give, it all adds up.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18040?refcode=ema20190630-39739&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=39739%2E444211%2Egxa37e)
We will only beat Trump, stop his inhumane policies, rise above deep division, and confront our greatest challenges if all of us come together at this moment in history.
When no one is written off, no one taken for granted, and when everyone is included -- there is no stopping this country and there is no stopping us. That’s the campaign and that’s the country we are building together. But tonight is an important hurdle that we absolutely have to clear.
**So I have one question for you: Are you in?**
Counting on you and grateful for everything so far,
Beto O’Rourke
**[Contribute](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18040?refcode=ema20190630-39739&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=39739%2E444211%2Egxa37e)**

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=21&akid=39739%2E444211%2Egxa37e). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

But if we want this kind of campaign to succeed, we have to meet each one of our goals. Tonight is our official FEC deadline, and we’re working hard to raise $600,000 online by midnight. We will only beat Trump, stop his inhumane policies, rise above deep division, and confront our greatest challenges if all of us come together at this moment in history. When no one is written off, no one taken for granted, and when everyone is included -- there is no stopping this country and there is no stopping us. That’s the campaign and that’s the country we are building together. But tonight is an important hurdle that we absolutely have to clear. So I have one question for you: Are you in? Counting on you and grateful for everything so far, Beto O’Rourke Paid for by Beto for America

name: MUST READ (via Team Baer)
subject: please read before midnight:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
If we can't win Dan's race in Colorado, our chances of flipping the Senate disappear.
|
---

| | This is the last time we're reaching out before Dan's first ever End of Quarter Deadline.

We need 27 more donations before midnight.

[**Can you chip in a few bucks so we can hit our first fundraising goal, oust Mitch McConnell from the Senate, and flip the entire Senate for Democrats? >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8266e/232dfd1/986c168/62a107e5/3840467829/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190630_em_fr_b3_mr_all&amount=19&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")

The Supreme Court. Health care. Women's reproductive rights. LGBTQ+ rights. The future of climate change. Protecting kids from gun violence. And so much more... it's all on the line.

If we can't win Dan's race in Colorado, our chances of flipping the Senate disappear.

And tonight's first End of Quarter Deadline is the most important of the entire election.

**[So we're quickly asking one last time: Can you chip in before midnight to elect Dan and flip the Senate for Democrats? We need just 27 more grassroots Democrats to step up. >>](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8266e/232dfd1/986c168/62a107ea/3840467829/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190630_em_fr_b3_mr_all&amount=19&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**

Thanks, Team Baer P.S. You can bet that Dan's still awake working right up to the last minute -- so he'll see your contribution come in as soon as you donate!

Friend,

**Results.**

_We know this is what Hoosiers want from their leaders above all else. And during Governor Holc omb’s time in office, strong results are exactly what he has provided. _

Indiana is the fiscal envy of the nation. We are home to record job commitments, record infrastructure investments, new workforce development opportunities and a state government that is becoming leaner and more responsive to the needs of Hoosiers.
[ **Chip in by June 30th @ 11:59pm to continue our Hoosier momentum** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=db1a06d49cda48a18ced779df5d0d638&_e=FxQVmn02Km1GT97o0JbY51nc8OGh_FKhUJHQxMK7KPYDGbPeGO2Jjbf6Z09cs_Yy-6zVNwlkokcQSoWOokDqMZAwXIkQWR-gx_enaa3TybXUQiDX1lTNB2oC3dsq9LuW8WrqVpyZ7_L6oAi82doM9L1Gtr17hCSmobi4UmJqzzHwlTvxFZPRge2Up-ovh4i5OxoliXPw7licDwbCMzpHtSPANCJkMy00qE-VLVu6zb_JeIrj2ZnIf0iot0Amzt5uEj2crRNy8ncLoP3aFzGnfyHC7G7pR0L0-z43p5irdo8uHsUwV11Wgpn5l5QyKIdD0XLxtBGtokOW2KOZA9ui2U89U2_hGReRakt3cu4zoY5ljEgAeY4q0X6vVYjuxv5DwAuEpcQ165JOx-H7cdUmwA%3D%3D)
During the 2019 legislative session alone, Governor Holcomb delivered big results for Hoosiers as part of his Next Level Agenda. He:
* Signed Indiana’s eighth-straight balanced budget
* Increased K-12 education funding by an historic $763 million
* Accelerated the completion of major highway projects
* Connected unserved Hoosiers to broadband internet
* Doubled down on Next Level Jobs
* Improved school safety
* Attacked the infant mortality rate
* Passed Indiana’s first bias crimes law
* And so much more!

These results are resonating in the lives of folks we hear from everyday, and as Hoosiers we could not be more proud of Governor Holcomb’s work.

Looking for a way to show you’re also proud of the results Governor Holcomb is delivering Hoosiers? There’s an opportunity right now.

This Sunday night, Governor Holcomb is facing a big fundraising deadline. [**June 30th marks the first official Holcomb Crew Fundraising Deadline of 2019**.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=db1a06d49cda48a18ced779df5d0d638&_e=FxQVmn02Km1GT97o0JbY51nc8OGh_FKhUJHQxMK7KPYDGbPeGO2Jjbf6Z09cs_Yy-6zVNwlkokcQSoWOokDqMZAwXIkQWR-gx_enaa3TybXUQiDX1lTNB2oC3dsq9LuW8WrqVpyZ7_L6oAi82doM9L1Gtr17hCSmobi4UmJqzzHwlTvxFZPRge2Up-ovh4i58HfqsOwhFHaJQ5O5XaRTVZknL48q5gjJwcvgt0MgFJraEOa22EujPMjRj1OsbJKZe0RzO4LHRZG7td7Dgp3ANoYprgnqaUZNx7gvXWV1TP1CW5HnxCg0BKBobm7tPdGImbFSvcLQJvAu0vPwktVN0gMZnyTibM_1jnXUmHN2KFUrZmJfN6BSnQi7WQ62cj6c7b2rn4zRY0_ngqV-HMK_uA%3D%3D) And you better believe the fundraising total for the period will make headlines.
If you like the results you’re seeing from Governor Holcomb, would you consider contributing to make our fundraising numbers even stronger? Hoosiers from everywhere in our state -- from Jeffersonville to Crown Point, and from Evansville to Fort Wayne -- are building a groundswell of support behind Governor Holcomb’s results.

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Molly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
#
Our daughter Molly turned 11 last Sunday.
Everything that I’m working so hard for, I’m doing for her and for children across this country, including some, her same age, separated from their families and who will be sleeping on concrete floors under tin foil blankets tonight.
To do right by them, to meet the challenges we face, we can’t take the same old approach. It’s going to take a new kind of politics. One driven by the urgency of the next generation: Climate activists marching for their future, and for everyone’s. Students marching for their lives, and for everyone’s.
It’ll take a movement like the one we led in Texas -- one that renewed our democracy by bringing everyone in and writing no one off. This is how we’ll defeat Donald Trump and bring this country together. First, we have tonight’s fundraising hurdle that we absolutely have to clear.
[I’m counting on you to pitch in one more time before our FEC deadline tonight at midnight. Please give what you can -- any amount gets us closer to the country we’re trying to build.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18048?refcode=ema20190630-39713&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=39713%2E444211%2EJhbbRY)
This is an important moment. Present and future generations are counting on us to meet it.
Grateful for everything you’ve given so far,
Beto O’Rourke
**[Contribute](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18048?refcode=ema20190630-39713&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=39713%2E444211%2EJhbbRY)**

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=21&akid=39713%2E444211%2EJhbbRY). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I'm not just another politician who's bought and paid for by the rich and powerful.
disclaimer_text: paid for by the rich and powerful
body:
Right now, because of decisions made in Washington -- tilted and distorted by the influence of big money -- our economy is only working for a thinner and thinner slice at the top. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ecfe/45c30650/1729b0da5/669dc802/1027589641/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
Our campaign doesn't belong to the wealthy and well-connected.

It doesn't belong to Wall Street, the big banks, giant corporations, hedge funds, the NRA, fossil fuel companies, or Big Pharma -- they can take their business elsewhere.

It doesn't belong to any of the powerful special interests that swarm the halls of Capitol Hill with lobbyists -- to crowd out the voices of Americans who don't want to get ripped off by credit card companies or poisoned by toxic chemicals in their water.

I don't sell my time to big donors who can write fat checks. I don't take any money from federal lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind.

**Our campaign belongs to you,** and you're the reason why I'm in this fight.

**But first, we need to send the strongest possible message to the special interests, in the only language that they speak: Money.** That means we need to put out the strongest possible fundraising report after tonight's midnight FEC deadline.

**My team has crunched the numbers, and we can hit our goal -- but only if 94 more people from Pennsylvania chip in. Can you be one of the 94? Every single donation -- of $3 or whatever you can pitch in -- adds up and makes a difference.** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

>
Here's what your contribution will mean: We'll be able to run a truly grassroots campaign. And that's the only way we'll be ready to transform Washington.

Right now, because of decisions made in Washington -- tilted and distorted by the influence of big money -- our economy is only working for a thinner and thinner slice at the top.

And when you've got a government and an economy that work great for the rich and powerful and not for everyone else, that is corruption, pure and simple.

We need to call it out, we need to attack it head on, and we need to make big, structural change to fix it.

I've got a plan for that -- to end Washington corruption, rebuild the middle class, save our democracy, and level the playing field for working people.

**But first, we need real resources to grow our person-to-person movement across the country. And we need to hit our goal before tonight 's midnight fundraising deadline. It'll only happen if we all pitch in.**

clean_body: Right now, because of decisions made in Washington -- tilted and distorted by the influence of big money -- our economy is only working for a thinner and thinner slice at the top. | | | "" Our campaign doesn't belong to the wealthy and well-connected. It doesn't belong to Wall Street, the big banks, giant corporations, hedge funds, the NRA, fossil fuel companies, or Big Pharma -- they can take their business elsewhere. It doesn't belong to any of the powerful special interests that swarm the halls of Capitol Hill with lobbyists -- to crowd out the voices of Americans who don't want to get ripped off by credit card companies or poisoned by toxic chemicals in their water. I don't sell my time to big donors who can write fat checks. I don't take any money from federal lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind. Our campaign belongs to you, and you're the reason why I'm in this fight. But first, we need to send the strongest possible message to the special interests, in the only language that they speak: Money. That means we need to put out the strongest possible fundraising report after tonight's midnight FEC deadline. My team has crunched the numbers, and we can hit our goal -- but only if 94 more people from Pennsylvania chip in. Can you be one of the 94? Every single donation -- of $3 or whatever you can pitch in -- adds up and makes a difference. | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" Here's what your contribution will mean: We'll be able to run a truly grassroots campaign. And that's the only way we'll be ready to transform Washington. Right now, because of decisions made in Washington -- tilted and distorted by the influence of big money -- our economy is only working for a thinner and thinner slice at the top. And when you've got a government and an economy that work great for the rich and powerful and not for everyone else, that is corruption, pure and simple. We need to call it out, we need to attack it head on, and we need to make big, structural change to fix it. I've got a plan for that -- to end Washington corruption, rebuild the middle class, save our democracy, and level the playing field for working people. But first, we need real resources to grow our person-to-person movement across the country. And we need to hit our goal before tonight 's midnight fundraising deadline. It'll only happen if we all pitch in. "" Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2019 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02116

name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: worried
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there -- we've spent the day running numbers to see if we're going to hit our $10,000 goal before tonight's deadline.
It's not looking good. Donations have really slowed down and we're pretty worried that if we lose any more momentum, Republicans will have no problem winning back this seat next cycle.
We've only got a few hours left, everyone, so we really need you to dig deep:
[**Please kick in $3 or more _tonight_ to protect this vulnerable Senate seat and win back a Democratic majority.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc216/2a380d31/3ff8ba0d/f13967/208693339/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDYzMF9lb3E0X1JPIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20190630_eoq4_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Senator Hassan's race was one of the most expensive in history and she only won by 1,017 votes, so we mean it when we say that the stakes are incredibly high.
Thank you so much for helping -- we promise the flood of emails in your inbox will die down tomorrow!
Best,
Maggie's campaign staff
